title: Declared Contract Index
description: Schema for normalized contract parity map output. Entries represent CONCEPTUAL parity assertions between backend and frontend, not endpoint-level machine truth. Null-safe fields reflect the intentional conceptual nature of this registry.

operationId.description: OpenAPI operationId, if known. Null for conceptual parity entries.

endpoint.description: API endpoint path or conceptual contract description. Null when not yet machine-traced.

method.description: HTTP method. Null for conceptual parity entries.

frontend_client.description: Frontend composable or API client consuming this contract.

schema_refs.description: OpenAPI schema references used by this contract.

notes.description: Detailed field mapping notes or gap description.
